scripts.predev: node scripts/fetch-cyoda-help-index.js --if-missing && node scripts/fetch-cyoda-openapi.js --if-missing && node scripts/fetch-cyoda-schemas.js --if-missing
scripts.build: npm run fetch:help-index && npm run fetch:openapi && npm run fetch:schemas && npm run generate:schema-pages && astro build && npm run export:markdown && npm run generate:llms && npm run generate:llms-full && npm run generate:md-sitemap && npm run package:schemas
scripts.perf:audit: npm run build && npx serve dist -l 3000 & sleep 3 && npx lighthouse http://localhost:3000 --budget-path=performance-budget.json --view && pkill -f 'serve dist'
scripts.perf:check: npm run build && npx lighthouse http://localhost:3000 --budget-path=performance-budget.json --output=json --output-path=lighthouse-report.json
